app.url.fullscreen_not_found.zh-CN: 未找到对应的全屏时钟：{zone_id}

filetype.open.header.subtitle.zh-CN: 请选择打开方式，再完成对应功能。
filetype.open.header.subtitle.en-US: Please select an open method, then complete the corresponding action.

filetype.open.no_actions.content.zh-CN: 当前没有可用的打开方式。

filetype.open.action.not_found.content.zh-CN: 所选处理方式已失效，请重试。
filetype.open.action.not_found.content.en-US: The selected method is no longer available. Please try again.

filetype.open.action.execute.failed.cont.zh-CN: 执行所选处理方式时发生异常。
filetype.open.action.execute.failed.cont.en-US: An error occurred while executing the selected method.

settings.theme.desc.zh-CN: 调整应用的整体外观配色

settings.language.desc.zh-CN: 设置应用显示语言（重启后完全生效）
settings.language.desc.en-US: Set application display language (restart for full effect)

settings.language.saved_content.zh-CN: 已切换为 {language}，建议重启应用以应用全部文案。
settings.language.saved_content.en-US: Switched to {language}. Restart app to apply all texts.

settings.ntp.enable.desc.zh-CN: 从网络服务器校准系统时间偏移
settings.ntp.enable.desc.en-US: Sync system clock offset with network server

settings.ntp.server.desc.zh-CN: 选择用于时间同步的服务器地址

settings.ntp.interval.desc.zh-CN: 设置自动同步的时间间隔（1 ~ 1440 分钟）

settings.ntp.not_enabled.content.zh-CN: 请先开启 NTP 同步，再执行立即同步。
settings.ntp.not_enabled.content.en-US: Please enable NTP sync before syncing now.

settings.url.status.off.zh-CN: 未注册（无法通过 URL 唤起）

settings.timer.sw_precision.desc.zh-CN: 控制秒表的时间显示精度

settings.timer.timer_precision.desc.zh-CN: 控制计时器的时间显示精度

settings.ringtone.hint.zh-CN: 在此管理铃声文件（仅支持 .wav）。闹钟、计时器、专注模式均从此列表中选取铃声。
settings.ringtone.hint.en-US: Manage ringtone files here (.wav only). Alarm, timer and focus mode use this list.

settings.notif.custom.desc.zh-CN: 开启后将使用悬浮 Toast 窗口代替系统托盘气泡
settings.notif.custom.desc.en-US: Use floating Toast notifications instead of system tray bubbles

settings.notif.pos.desc.zh-CN: Toast 通知弹出的屏幕位置

settings.notif.duration.desc.zh-CN: 通知显示时长（0 秒 = 常驻，需手动关闭）

settings.notif.test.desc.zh-CN: 点击右侧按钮发送一条测试 Toast 通知
settings.notif.test.desc.en-US: Click button to send a test Toast notification

settings.notif.test.msg_content.zh-CN: 这是一条自定义 Toast 通知示例。
settings.notif.test.msg_content.en-US: This is a sample custom Toast notification.

settings.alarm.alert.desc.zh-CN: 提醒窗口 / 全屏显示时间，超时后自动启用稍后提醒（10 ~ 600 秒）
settings.alarm.alert.desc.en-US: Alert window/fullscreen duration before snooze (10 ~ 600 sec)

settings.more.zh-CN: 更多设置选项持续开发中……

plugin.perm.deps_hint.zh-CN: 该插件声明需要这些第三方库
plugin.perm.deps_hint.en-US: This plugin declares these third-party libraries

plugin.security.desc.zh-CN: 当前已支持声明权限、运行期申请、宿主敏感服务过滤、模块卸载清理和权限审计。
plugin.security.desc.en-US: Plugins now support declared permissions, runtime permission requests, sensitive host-service filtering, module cleanup on unload, and permission audit logs.

plugin.security.detail.zh-CN: 但这仍是软隔离而非强沙箱：不可信插件仍可能直接调用 Python 或第三方库访问系统资源。源码扫描仅供参考，请只安装可信来源插件。
plugin.security.detail.en-US: This is still soft isolation, not a strong sandbox: untrusted plugins may still access system resources through Python or third-party libraries. Source scanning is best-effort only, so install plugins only from trusted sources.

plugin.reload.disabled.zh-CN: 插件已禁用，请先启用后再热重载
plugin.reload.disabled.en-US: The plugin is disabled. Enable it before hot reloading.

plugin.empty.zh-CN:
暂无已发现插件。请将插件放入 plugins_ext/ 目录后重新扫描，
或点击「导入插件」从本地安装。
plugin.empty.en-US:
No plugins found. Put plugins into plugins_ext/ and rescan,
or click 'Import Plugins' to install from local files.

plugin.perm.scan_warn.content.zh-CN:
插件「{plugin}」代码中检测到可能未声明的权限：{names}。
结果仅供参考，无法保证安全。
plugin.perm.scan_warn.content.en-US:
Potential undeclared permissions detected in plugin '{plugin}': {names}.
Result is for reference only and not a security guarantee.

plugin.import.ok_content.zh-CN: 已成功导入 {count} 个插件

perm.dialog.install.desc.zh-CN: 插件 {plugin} 需要安装以下第三方库才能正常运行：
perm.dialog.install.desc.en-US: Plugin {plugin} needs these third-party packages to run:

perm.dialog.install.notice.zh-CN: 这些库将被下载并安装到插件私有目录，不会影响系统 Python 环境。
perm.dialog.install.notice.en-US: Packages will be installed into plugin private directory and won't affect system Python.

perm.dialog.sys.desc.zh-CN: 插件 {plugin} 请求以下系统权限：
perm.dialog.sys.desc.en-US: Plugin {plugin} requests the following system permission:

perm.dialog.sys.notice.zh-CN: 授予权限后，插件可在每次运行时使用该能力。您可随时在插件管理界面撤销。
perm.dialog.sys.notice.en-US: After granting, plugin can use this capability on each run. You can revoke it in plugin manager anytime.

perm.risk.network.zh-CN: 访问互联网，可能发送或接收数据
perm.risk.network.en-US: Access internet and may send/receive data

perm.risk.fs_read.zh-CN: 读取系统中的任意文件

perm.risk.fs_write.zh-CN: 修改或删除系统中的任意文件
perm.risk.fs_write.en-US: Modify or delete arbitrary files on system

perm.risk.os_exec.zh-CN: 以当前用户身份执行任意外部命令
perm.risk.os_exec.en-US: Execute arbitrary commands as current user

perm.risk.os_env.zh-CN: 读取或修改系统环境变量

perm.risk.clipboard.zh-CN: 读取或写入系统剪贴板

perm.risk.install_pkg.zh-CN: 向插件目录安装第三方 Python 库
perm.risk.install_pkg.en-US: Install third-party Python packages into plugin dir

world_time.fs.hint.zh-CN: Tab 切换编辑模式  ·  Esc 退出全屏
world_time.fs.hint.en-US: Tab to toggle edit mode - Esc to exit fullscreen

automation.not_selected.content.zh-CN: 请先选择一条规则再保存

automation.placeholder.select.zh-CN: 请先在「规则列表」中选择或新建一条规则
automation.placeholder.select.en-US: Select or create a rule from the Rules tab

automation.placeholder.select_sub.zh-CN: 点击规则卡片上的「编辑」按钮即可开始编辑
automation.placeholder.select_sub.en-US: Click Edit on a rule card to start editing

automation.placeholder.open.zh-CN: 请先在「规则列表」中打开一条规则
automation.placeholder.open.en-US: Open a rule from the Rules tab first

automation.placeholder.open_sub.zh-CN: 在列表点「编辑」打开已有规则；点击上方 + 新建规则
automation.placeholder.open_sub.en-US: Click Edit in list to open a rule, or use + to create one

automation.actions.empty.zh-CN: 暂无动作 —— 点击「添加动作」来添加
automation.actions.empty.en-US: No actions yet — click Add Action

automation.param.alarm_id.zh-CN: 闹钟 ID（可选，留空则匹配所有）

automation.param.alarm_id.ph.zh-CN: 填写闹钟 ID 或留空
automation.param.alarm_id.ph.en-US: Enter alarm ID or leave empty

home.hint.zh-CN: 从左侧选择一个页面以开始
home.hint.en-US: Select a page from the left to start

timer.invalid_format.en-US: Please enter a valid duration, e.g. 05:00

focus.pause_on_distract.zh-CN: 触发不专注时自动暂停计时

focus.select_preset.zh-CN: 请在左侧选择或新建预设
focus.select_preset.en-US: Please select or create a preset on the left

focus.distracted_paused.zh-CN: ⚠ 不专注 · 计时已暂停

today.fetching_wallpaper.zh-CN: 正在自动获取今日壁纸…

today.fetch_failed.zh-CN: 获取失败，请点击「重新获取」重试
today.fetch_failed.en-US: Fetch failed, click 'Retry' to try again

focus.session_complete_msg.zh-CN: 本轮专注时间已结束，休息一下吧！
focus.session_complete_msg.en-US: Focus session ended. Time for a break!

focus.break_end_msg.zh-CN: 休息时间结束，准备开始下一轮专注！
focus.break_end_msg.en-US: Break time is over. Ready for next focus session!

focus.preset_done.zh-CN: 预设「{name}」已完成全部 {cycles} 个循环！

boot.menu.crash_reason.zh-CN: 检测到应用在短时间内异常退出了 {count} 次，建议选择安全启动进行排查。
boot.menu.crash_reason.en-US: The app crashed {count} times recently. Safe Mode is recommended for troubleshooting.

boot.menu.manual_reason.zh-CN: 您主动选择了在启动时显示此菜单。
boot.menu.manual_reason.en-US: You have chosen to show this menu at startup.

boot.mode.normal.desc.zh-CN: 加载所有插件并启用自动化，与往常相同。
boot.mode.normal.desc.en-US: Load all plugins and enable automation, as usual.

boot.mode.safe.desc.zh-CN: 跳过所有插件加载，不触发任何自动化规则。适合排查插件/自动化导致的崩溃。
boot.mode.safe.desc.en-US: Skip all plugins and disable automation. Useful for diagnosing crashes.

boot.mode.hidden.desc.zh-CN: 直接最小化到系统托盘，不显示主窗口。
boot.mode.hidden.desc.en-US: Start minimized to system tray without showing the main window.

boot.mode.custom.desc.zh-CN: 输入额外启动参数传递给程序。
boot.mode.custom.desc.en-US: Enter extra arguments to pass to the application.

boot.safe_mode.plugin_hint.zh-CN: 安全模式已开启，插件未加载。重启并选择「正常启动」可恢复插件功能。
boot.safe_mode.plugin_hint.en-US: Safe Mode is active. Plugins are not loaded. Restart and choose Normal Mode to restore.

boot.safe_mode.automation_hint.zh-CN: 安全模式已开启，所有自动化规则不会自动触发。
boot.safe_mode.automation_hint.en-US: Safe Mode is active. Automation rules will not fire automatically.

settings.startup.autostart.desc.zh-CN: 登录 Windows 后自动启动小树时钟（后台隐藏启动）
settings.startup.autostart.desc.en-US: Automatically launch Little Tree Clock after Windows sign-in (start hidden in background)

settings.startup.boot_menu.label.zh-CN: 下次启动打开启动菜单

settings.startup.boot_menu.desc.zh-CN: 下次启动时显示启动选项菜单（正常/安全/隐藏/自定义），仅生效一次
settings.startup.boot_menu.desc.en-US: Show startup options menu (Normal/Safe/Hidden/Custom) on next launch, once only

boot.already_running.desc.zh-CN:
小树时钟已经在运行中。
您可以在系统托盘找到它，或选择下方操作。
boot.already_running.desc.en-US:
Little Tree Clock is already running.
You can find it in the system tray, or choose an action below.

boot.already_running.close_hint.zh-CN: 关闭  —  仅关闭此提示，正在运行的程序不受影响。
boot.already_running.close_hint.en-US: Close  —  Dismiss this dialog; the running instance is unaffected.

boot.already_running.restart_hint.zh-CN: 重启  —  退出正在运行的程序，然后重新启动。
boot.already_running.restart_hint.en-US: Restart  —  Quit the running instance and start a fresh one.

plugin.store.search.placeholder.zh-CN: 搜索名称、作者、描述或标签
plugin.store.search.placeholder.en-US: Search by name, author, description or tag

plugin.store.summary.zh-CN: 共 {total} 个插件，第 {page}/{pages} 页

plugin.store.empty.remote.zh-CN: 暂无商店数据，可点击右上角刷新。
plugin.store.empty.remote.en-US: No store data yet. Click refresh to load plugins.

plugin.store.empty.filtered.zh-CN: 没有符合当前筛选条件的插件。
plugin.store.empty.filtered.en-US: No plugins match the current filters.

first_use.header.subtitle.zh-CN: 先完成基础偏好设置，随后再进入主界面并加载插件。
first_use.header.subtitle.en-US: Complete basic preferences before entering the main interface and loading plugins.

first_use.welcome.subtitle.zh-CN: 先选择界面语言，再继续。
first_use.welcome.subtitle.en-US: First, select the interface language to continue.

first_use.welcome.language.desc.zh-CN: 语言会立即生效，并在后续页面保持一致。
first_use.welcome.language.desc.en-US: The language takes effect immediately and remains consistent throughout.

first_use.welcome.quick_hint.zh-CN: 看不懂当前文字？点击 English | If unreadable, click 中文 or English.
first_use.welcome.quick_hint.en-US: If this text is unreadable, click English or 中文 below to switch language.

first_use.preferences.subtitle.zh-CN: 你可以先设置主题；之后仍可在设置页面随时修改。
first_use.preferences.subtitle.en-US: Set your theme now; you can always change it later in settings.

first_use.preferences.theme.desc.zh-CN: 设置主界面的整体观感
first_use.preferences.theme.desc.en-US: Set the overall look of the main interface

first_use.preferences.tip.zh-CN: 选择一个你喜欢的主题，它会立即预览。
first_use.preferences.tip.en-US: Select a theme you like to preview it immediately.

first_use.network.subtitle.zh-CN: 配置 NTP 时间同步与 PyPI 镜像源，加速插件依赖下载。
first_use.network.subtitle.en-US: Configure NTP time sync and PyPI mirror to speed up plugin dependency downloads.

first_use.network.ntp.desc.zh-CN: 自动从网络校准时间，确保时钟精准
first_use.network.ntp.desc.en-US: Automatically calibrate time from network for accuracy

first_use.network.pypi.desc.zh-CN: 插件安装依赖时使用的下载源
first_use.network.pypi.desc.en-US: Download source for plugin dependency installation

first_use.network.tip.zh-CN: 国内用户建议选择国内镜像以加速下载。
first_use.network.tip.en-US: Users in China are advised to select a domestic mirror for faster downloads.

first_use.system.subtitle.zh-CN: 配置 URL Scheme 与开机自启动。
first_use.system.subtitle.en-US: Configure URL Scheme and auto-start on login.

first_use.system.url.desc.zh-CN: 注册后可通过 {scheme}:// 拉起应用。示例：{views}
first_use.system.url.desc.en-US: After registration, you can launch the app via {scheme}://. Examples: {views}

first_use.system.autostart.desc.zh-CN: 登录 Windows 后自动启动小树时钟（后台隐藏启动）
first_use.system.autostart.desc.en-US: Automatically launch Little Tree Clock after Windows sign-in (start hidden in background)

first_use.notification.subtitle.zh-CN: 设置通知出现位置和停留时长。
first_use.notification.subtitle.en-US: Configure notification position and display duration.

first_use.learning.subtitle.zh-CN: 配置秒表与计时器的显示精度。
first_use.learning.subtitle.en-US: Configure stopwatch and timer display precision.

first_use.finish.subtitle.zh-CN: 确认以下配置后即可进入主窗口。
first_use.finish.subtitle.en-US: Confirm the settings below to enter the main window.

first_use.finish.tip.zh-CN: 点击“完成并进入”后，应用将按所选设置启动并开始加载插件。
first_use.finish.tip.en-US: Click 'Finish and Enter' to start the application with chosen settings and load plugins.

world_time.desktop_shortcut.unsupported.zh-CN: 当前操作系统不支持桌面快捷方式
world_time.desktop_shortcut.unsupported.en-US: Desktop shortcuts are not supported on this OS

world_time.shortcut.created.content.zh-CN: 已在桌面创建「{name}」全屏快捷方式
world_time.shortcut.created.content.en-US: Created fullscreen shortcut for '{name}' on Desktop

world_time.shortcut.failed.content.zh-CN: 无法创建桌面快捷方式：{detail}

plugin.local.delete.confirm.content.zh-CN: 将永久删除插件「{name}」，此操作不可撤销。是否继续？
plugin.local.delete.confirm.content.en-US: Plugin '{name}' will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. Continue?

migration.subtitle.zh-CN: 导出或导入应用配置、插件及其数据。
migration.subtitle.en-US: Export or import app settings, plugins and their data.

migration.action.desc.zh-CN: 选择要执行的操作：导出当前配置到文件，或从文件导入配置。
migration.action.desc.en-US: Choose an action: export current settings to a file, or import from a file.

migration.action.export.desc.zh-CN: 将当前配置、插件和数据导出为可移植的配置文件。
migration.action.export.desc.en-US: Export current settings, plugins and data to a portable config file.

migration.action.import.desc.zh-CN: 从配置文件恢复配置、插件和数据。
migration.action.import.desc.en-US: Restore settings, plugins and data from a config file.

migration.select.export.desc.zh-CN: 勾选要导出的配置项。依赖文件包含插件所需的第三方库，体积较大。
migration.select.export.desc.en-US: Check items to export. Dependencies include third-party libraries and may be large.

migration.select.import.desc.zh-CN: 将配置文件拖入下方区域，或点击浏览选择文件。
migration.select.import.desc.en-US: Drag a config file into the area below, or click to browse.

migration.confirm.export.desc.zh-CN: 设置导出文件名和保存位置。
migration.confirm.export.desc.en-US: Set export filename and save location.

migration.confirm.import.desc.zh-CN: 勾选要从配置文件导入的项目。
migration.confirm.import.desc.en-US: Check items to import from the config file.

migration.tree.note.dependencies.zh-CN: 第三方库，通常不建议迁移
migration.tree.note.dependencies.en-US: Third-party libraries, usually not recommended for migration

layout.open.header.subtitle.zh-CN: 请选择打开方式，再完成对应功能。
layout.open.header.subtitle.en-US: Select an open method, then complete the required steps.

layout.open.step.warning.validation_fail.zh-CN: 当前步骤校验失败，请重试。
layout.open.step.warning.validation_fail.en-US: Validation failed for this step. Please try again.

layout.open.step.warning.fill_required.zh-CN: 请先补全当前步骤信息。
layout.open.step.warning.fill_required.en-US: Please fill in required information before continuing.

layout.open.step.execute.content.zh-CN: 确认后将执行所选打开方式。
layout.open.step.execute.content.en-US: The selected open action will be executed after confirmation.

layout.open.select.empty_text.en-US: No options are available right now.

layout.open.select.empty_error.en-US: Please select an option before continuing.

layout.open.read.invalid_widgets.zh-CN: 布局文件缺少组件列表
layout.open.read.invalid_widgets.en-US: The layout file is missing the widget list.

layout.open.read.invalid_widget_item.zh-CN: 布局文件中第 {idx} 个组件配置无效
layout.open.read.invalid_widget_item.en-US: Widget config #{idx} in the layout file is invalid.

layout.open.apply.no_canvas.content.zh-CN: 当前未配置世界时钟画布，无法应用布局。
layout.open.apply.no_canvas.content.en-US: No world-time canvas is configured, so this layout cannot be applied.

layout.open.apply.select_canvas.content.zh-CN: 将布局应用到哪个全屏时钟画布：
layout.open.apply.select_canvas.content.en-US: Which fullscreen clock canvas should this layout be applied to?

layout.open.action.builtin.apply_fullscr.zh-CN: 选择目标画布并立即应用布局
layout.open.action.builtin.apply_fullscr.en-US: Select a target canvas and apply the layout immediately

layout.open.action.builtin.step.select_c.zh-CN: 请选择要应用布局的全屏时钟画布。
layout.open.action.builtin.step.select_c.en-US: Select the fullscreen clock canvas to apply this layout to.

layout.open.action.builtin.step.select_c.zh-CN: 当前没有可用画布，请先在世界时间中创建画布。
layout.open.action.builtin.step.select_c.en-US: No canvas is available. Please create one in World Time first.

layout.open.no_actions.content.zh-CN: 当前没有可用的布局打开方式。
layout.open.no_actions.content.en-US: There are no available layout open methods at the moment.

layout.open.action.not_found.content.zh-CN: 所选布局处理方式已失效，请重试。
layout.open.action.not_found.content.en-US: The selected layout action is no longer available. Please try again.

layout.open.action.execute.failed.conten.zh-CN: 执行所选布局处理方式时发生异常。
layout.open.action.execute.failed.conten.en-US: An error occurred while executing the selected layout action.
